hero_subtitle: SFTY Business helps VASPs apply jurisdiction-specific KYT rules to international wallet transfers by connecting multi-provider data into structured workflows with audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Kyt policies become inconsistent across borders
problem_description: Compliance teams face difficulties enforcing KYT rules when transaction data and wallet activity span multiple jurisdictions. This creates gaps in risk visibility and slows cross-border transaction reviews with weak evidence traceability for audit and regulatory scrutiny.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction data, provider outputs and regulatory requirements into one workflow that enforces jurisdiction-specific KYT policies with clear audit evidence and consistent risk controls.
workflow_title: From cross-border wallet risk to review
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates international wallet and transaction risk signals into structured reviews, case workflows, evidence logging and compliance reporting for VASP teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented inputs. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects cross-border KYT outputs into structured cases, decisions and evidence, enabling compliance teams to apply jurisdiction-specific rules with clear operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs applying jurisdiction-specific KYT policies with audit-ready evidence and governed provider orchestration in enterprise-grade deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how cross-border KYT policies manage wallet risks
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how cross-border transactions trigger KYT workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports international transaction reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for cross-border KYT compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects multi-jurisdictional KYT rules, monitoring, case management and reporting for VASPs managing cross-border digital asset transactions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle international wallet transfers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals, applies jurisdictional policies, routes reviews, and creates cases for compliance across international transfers and counterparties.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve cross-border audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories, provider outputs and supporting evidence to maintain audit-ready records of cross-border transaction reviews and compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect jurisdiction-specific KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates multiple KYT and Travel Rule providers and applies local rules to their outputs within one operational compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYT or Travel Rule tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing KYT and Travel Rule providers by connecting their outputs into structured workflows, evidence, cases and reporting without replacing them.
final_title: Apply cross-border KYT policy with one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects international wallet transfers, provider outputs and regulatory rules into audit-ready KYT compliance cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
